description: Combines two ordered latencies streams by iterating through them and appending elements in ascending order.
Appends element 'a' to the merged list when 'a' is less than 'b'.
Appends element 'b' to the merged list when 'b' is less than 'a'.

conditions: merged and left and right and (merged[-1] == left[-1] == right[-1])
description: Removes the last matching element from the merged list when both input lists end together.
Iterates through the input lists 'left' and 'right' to merge them.
